title: Networking
description: Game network protocols and packet analysis.

topics.title: TCP & UDP
topics.explanation:
TCP — reliable, ordered (login, chat, file transfer)
UDP — fast, unreliable (position updates, shots)

Games often use UDP with custom reliability layers.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for TCP & UDP
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment
Apply knowledge to a simple open-source game target
Document findings and review prerequisites for advanced topics
exercises: Write a summary explaining TCP & UDP in your own words
Create a diagram mapping key concepts and relationships
Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: Packet Structures
topics.description: Designing and reverse engineering packet layouts.
topics.explanation:
Typical packet: header (opcode, size, sequence) + payload.

RE workflow: capture → identify patterns → correlate with game actions → map fields.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Packet Structures
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment
Apply knowledge to a simple open-source game target
Document findings and review prerequisites for advanced topics
exercises: Write a summary explaining Packet Structures in your own words
Create a diagram mapping key concepts and relationships
Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: Serialization
topics.description: How games encode data for network.
topics.explanation: Common formats: protobuf, flatbuffers, bitstreams, custom binary. Look for serialize/deserialize functions via strings and xrefs.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Serialization
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment
Apply knowledge to a simple open-source game target
Document findings and review prerequisites for advanced topics
exercises: Write a summary explaining Serialization in your own words
Create a diagram mapping key concepts and relationships
Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: Protocol Analysis
topics.explanation:
Tools: Wireshark (with dissectors), WPE Pro (legacy), custom parsers.

Practice on open-source multiplayer games with documented protocols.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Protocol Analysis
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment
Apply knowledge to a simple open-source game target
Document findings and review prerequisites for advanced topics
